name: Zayd ibn Ruqad
title: Cowardly Killer
shortDescription: One of the ruthless Kufan soldiers who cowardly shot and martyred companions like Suwayd ibn Amr.
fullStory:
Zayd ibn Ruqad al-Juhani was an archer and hard-hearted soldier in Umar ibn Sa'd's army on Ashura. He represents cowardice on the battlefield.

He was the one who, when 'Suwayd ibn Amr' (the brave old man of the Imam's army) was severely wounded and fell among the dead, rose again with a dagger upon hearing the false news of the Imam's death. At this moment, Zayd ibn Ruqad and Urwa ibn Battat attacked him and martyred him.

He also played a role in attacking Abbas's (AS) hands and shooting him with arrows. It is also said that he shot an arrow at 'Abdullah ibn Muslim's' forehead; Abdullah placed his hand on his forehead, and his hand was pinned to his forehead by the arrow.

Zayd ibn Ruqad was identified and surrounded after Mukhtar's uprising. Mukhtar's forces attacked him with stones and swords, making him pay for his shameful deeds.
quoteArabic: رَمَيْتُ فَتًى مِنْهُمْ بِسَهْمٍ وَهُوَ واضِعٌ كَفَّهُ عَلى جَبْهَتِهِ...
quote: (His confession in Kufa:) I shot a youth among them with an arrow while his hand was on his forehead, pinning his hand to his forehead...
